understanding.goal_understanding: The goal was to complete all levels of the KA59 puzzle game by maneuvering selectable pieces to push blocks onto goal tiles marked '+', achieving a WIN condition per level until the entire run is won.
understanding.mechanics_understanding: Movement actions shift the selected piece (P) exactly one cell (3 pixels) in a direction; pushables like blocks (B) can be pushed if adjacent. Walls (#) block movement variably. Multiple selectables (S) require CLICK to exact pixel positions [x,y] to switch control. Heuristics like movement.blocked provide hints but actions must be tested; steps are limited per level.
